languages.text: "Этот трон — творение Омниссии, созданное столетия назад. Даже до кощунственного надругательства над реликвией нам едва удавалось умилостивить ее древний машинный дух на проведение сакральных аугментических операций — многие литании и протоколы эксплуатации не сохранились в веках. Теперь же, с гибелью смотрителей имплантационного трона во время бунта, они утеряны окончательно. Святыня должна быть спасена любой ценой".

"This throne is a creation of the Omnissiah made centuries ago. Even before the unholy desecration of the relic, we were barely able to propitiate its ancient machine spirit to perform sacred augmentation procedures — many litanies and operating protocols did not survive through the ages. Now, with the demise of the keepers of the implantation throne during the mutiny, they have been lost forever. This sacred machine must be saved at all cost."
languages.original_text: "Этот трон — творение Омниссии, созданное столетия назад. Даже до кощунственного надругательства над реликвией нам едва удавалось умилостивить ее древний машинный дух на проведение сакральных аугментических операций — многие литании и протоколы эксплуатации не сохранились в веках. Теперь же, с гибелью смотрителей имплантационного трона во время бунта, они утеряны окончательно. Святыня должна быть спасена любой ценой".

Now, with the demise of the keepers of the implantation throne during the mutiny, they have been lost forever. This sacred machine must be saved at all cost."

languages.text: “这座王座是欧姆尼赛亚数百年前创造的神迹。即便在这件圣物遭到亵渎之前，我们也仅能勉强安抚它古老的机魂，使其能够执行神圣的植入物手术——许多祷文和操作规程已在漫长岁月中失传。如今，在那场叛乱中，移植王座的守护者尽数死去，那些知识也随之彻底消失。我们必须不惜一切代价挽救这台神圣机器。”
languages.original_text: "This throne is a creation of the Omnissiah made centuries ago. Even before the unholy desecration of the relic, we were barely able to propitiate its ancient machine spirit to perform sacred augmentation procedures — many litanies and operating protocols did not survive through the ages. Now, with the demise of the keepers of the implantation throne during the mutiny, they have been lost forever. This sacred machine must be saved at all cost."

traits.locale_text: “这座王座是欧姆尼赛亚数百年前创造的神迹。即便在这件圣物遭到亵渎之前，我们也仅能勉强安抚它古老的机魂，使其能够执行神圣的植入物手术——许多祷文和操作规程已在漫长岁月中失传。如今，在那场叛乱中，移植王座的守护者尽数死去，那些知识也随之彻底消失。我们必须不惜一切代价挽救这台神圣机器。”

languages.text: «Este trono es una creación del Omnissiah que data de hace siglos. Incluso antes de su blasfema profanación, apenas éramos capaces de propiciar a su antiguo espíritu máquina para que realizara los sagrados procedimientos de aumento. Muchos de sus protocolos de operación y letanías han sido víctimas del paso del tiempo. Ahora, tras la muerte de los custodios del trono de implantación durante el motín, se han perdido para siempre. Debemos salvar la sagrada máquina a cualquier precio».
languages.original_text: "This throne is a creation of the Omnissiah made centuries ago. Even before the unholy desecration of the relic, we were barely able to propitiate its ancient machine spirit to perform sacred augmentation procedures — many litanies and operating protocols did not survive through the ages. Now, with the demise of the keepers of the implantation throne during the mutiny, they have been lost forever. This sacred machine must be saved at all cost."

traits.locale_text: «Este trono es una creación del Omnissiah que data de hace siglos. Incluso antes de su blasfema profanación, apenas éramos capaces de propiciar a su antiguo espíritu máquina para que realizara los sagrados procedimientos de aumento. Muchos de sus protocolos de operación y letanías han sido víctimas del paso del tiempo. Ahora, tras la muerte de los custodios del trono de implantación durante el motín, se han perdido para siempre. Debemos salvar la sagrada máquina a cualquier precio».

languages.text: « Ce fauteuil est une création de l'Omnimessie, réalisée il y a des siècles. Même avant la profanation impie de la relique, nous peinions à inciter l'ancien esprit de la machine à exécuter les procédures d'augmentations sacrées. De nombreux protocoles d'opération et litanies n'ont pas survécu au passage du temps. Et maintenant, avec le trépas des gardiens du fauteuil d'implantation au cours de la mutinerie, ils sont perdus à jamais. Cette machine sacrée doit être sauvée à tout prix. »
languages.original_text: "This throne is a creation of the Omnissiah made centuries ago. Even before the unholy desecration of the relic, we were barely able to propitiate its ancient machine spirit to perform sacred augmentation procedures — many litanies and operating protocols did not survive through the ages. Now, with the demise of the keepers of the implantation throne during the mutiny, they have been lost forever. This sacred machine must be saved at all cost."

traits.locale_text: « Ce fauteuil est une création de l'Omnimessie, réalisée il y a des siècles. Et maintenant, avec le trépas des gardiens du fauteuil d'implantation au cours de la mutinerie, ils sont perdus à jamais. Cette machine sacrée doit être sauvée à tout prix. »

languages.text: "Bu taht, Hermesih'in yüzyıllar önce yapılmış bir yaratımıdır. Yadigâra yapılan o saygısızca hakaretten önce bile kutsal ogmentasyon prosedürlerini gerçekleştirmesi için kadim makine ruhunu zar zor yatıştırabiliyorduk. Birçok ilahi ve işletim protokolü, çağlar içinde günümüze ulaşamadı. İsyan sırasında implantasyon tahtının muhafızlarının ölmesiyle birlikte sonsuza dek kayboldular. Bu kutsal makine, ne pahasına olursa olsun kurtarılmalıdır."
languages.original_text: "This throne is a creation of the Omnissiah made centuries ago. Even before the unholy desecration of the relic, we were barely able to propitiate its ancient machine spirit to perform sacred augmentation procedures — many litanies and operating protocols did not survive through the ages. Now, with the demise of the keepers of the implantation throne during the mutiny, they have been lost forever. This sacred machine must be saved at all cost."

Birçok ilahi ve işletim protokolü, çağlar içinde günümüze ulaşamadı. İsyan sırasında implantasyon tahtının muhafızlarının ölmesiyle birlikte sonsuza dek kayboldular. Bu kutsal makine, ne pahasına olursa olsun kurtarılmalıdır."

languages.text: "Dieser Thron wurde vom Omnissiah vor vielen Jahrhunderten geschaffen. Selbst vor der unheiligen Entweihung des Reliktes waren wir kaum in der Lage, seinen Maschinengeist für heilige Augmentationsprozeduren zu besänftigen ... viele Litaneien und Operationsprotokolle haben die Zeiten nicht überdauert. Nun, da die Hüter des Implantationsthrons während der Meuterei den Tod fanden, sind sie für immer verloren. Diese heilige Maschine muss mit allen Mitteln gerettet werden."
languages.original_text: "This throne is a creation of the Omnissiah made centuries ago. Even before the unholy desecration of the relic, we were barely able to propitiate its ancient machine spirit to perform sacred augmentation procedures — many litanies and operating protocols did not survive through the ages. Now, with the demise of the keepers of the implantation throne during the mutiny, they have been lost forever. This sacred machine must be saved at all cost."

traits.locale_text: "Dieser Thron wurde vom Omnissiah vor vielen Jahrhunderten geschaffen. Selbst vor der unheiligen Entweihung des Reliktes waren wir kaum in der Lage, seinen Maschinengeist für heilige Augmentationsprozeduren zu besänftigen ... viele Litaneien und Operationsprotokolle haben die Zeiten nicht überdauert. Nun, da die Hüter des Implantationsthrons während der Meuterei den Tod fanden, sind sie für immer verloren. Diese heilige Maschine muss mit allen Mitteln gerettet werden."

languages.text: 「この王座は、何世紀も前にオムニシアが造ったものだ。この聖なる遺物に不浄な汚染が及ぶ以前にも、我々は、この古代の機械霊を鎮め、聖なる増幅手術を行うことがやっとできた。多くの祈祷文や操作手順は、時代を超えて生き残らなかった。そして、反乱の最中に、この植入王座の守護者が亡くなったことで、それらは永遠に失われた。この聖なる機械は、どんな犠牲を払っても守らねばならない。」
languages.original_text: "This throne is a creation of the Omnissiah made centuries ago. Even before the unholy desecration of the relic, we were barely able to propitiate its ancient machine spirit to perform sacred augmentation procedures — many litanies and operating protocols did not survive through the ages. Now, with the demise of the keepers of the implantation throne during the mutiny, they have been lost forever. This sacred machine must be saved at all cost."

traits.locale_text: 「この王座は、何世紀も前にオムニシアが造ったものだ。この聖なる遺物に不浄な汚染が及ぶ以前にも、我々は、この古代の機械霊を鎮め、聖なる増幅手術を行うことがやっとできた。多くの祈祷文や操作手順は、時代を超えて生き残らなかった。そして、反乱の最中に、この植入王座の守護者が亡くなったことで、それらは永遠に失われた。この聖なる機械は、どんな犠牲を払っても守らねばならない。」
